page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion - Photo File Eve Venus at the 2015 A.D. -
text:
Neon Genesis Evangelion - Photo File Eve Venus at the 2015 A.D. - is an artbook published by Kadokawa Shoten on 01 August 1997. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4048526618/ref=mp_s_a_1_1?crid=1V104EFHFO65M&keywords=%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%B4%80%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B4%E3%82%A1%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B2%E3%83%AA%E3%82%AA%E3%83%B3%E3%83%95%E3%82%A9%E3%83%88%E3%83%95%E3%82%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%A4%E3%83%BC%E3%82%A4%E3%83%96& 

Overview

The book is dedicated to the female character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series. It consists of a collection of screenshots from the series along with some information about the characters. The book is divided into several parts, each dedicated to a character: Rei Ayanami, Asuka Langley Sohryu, Hikari Horaki, Misato Katsuragi, Ritsuko Akagi and Maya Ibuki. Notes are available at the end of the book with advertisements for figurines. Sketches from the Neon Genesis Evangelion Proposal document can also be seen in the book.

Table of Contents

INTRODUCTION 04
AGE OF INNOCENT
Ayanami Rei 06
Sohryu Asuka Langley 22
Horaki Hogari 32
PRISONER
Katsuragi Misato 36
Akagi Ritsuko 44
Ibuki Maya 50
FIGURESTYLE 54
DESIGN WORKS 58
